title: How to make non-blocking assignment behave correctly for systemc converting from RTL

features.name: non-blocking assignment with -x-assign fast
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment (<=) inside an always @(posedge clk) block when -x-assign fast is used

features.name: systemc signal driving systemverilog input
features.description: Code should include a SystemC sc_signal driving a SystemVerilog module input that feeds a non-blocking assignment
